title: Trump administration expected to slash Iran war funding request
summary_full: The eventual ask of Congress is likely to fall between $80 billion and $100 billion, officials said, less than half the amount of an earlier proposal to offset costs of the conflict.
summary_public: The eventual ask of Congress is likely to fall between $80 billion and $100 billion, officials said, less than half the amount of an earlier proposal to offset costs of the conflict.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: slash Iran war funding request, offset costs of the conflict
